# Classic Micrones

> Manufacturer and supplier of high-purity Ground Calcium Carbonate (GCC) and micronised marble powder from Makrana, Rajasthan — serving paint, paper, plastic, PVC, pharma and rubber industries across India.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Classic Micrones, products and industries served.
- [About](/about): Company background, Makrana mining heritage and capabilities.
- [Products](/products): GCC and micronised marble powder grades and specifications.
- [Industries](/industries): Industries served with calcium carbonate solutions.
- [Why Us](/why-us): Quality, sourcing and supply differentiators.
- [Contact](/contact): Sales, purchase and management contacts.

## Industry Pages

- [Paint Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-paint-industry): CaCO₃ for emulsions, primers, putty and coatings.
- [Paper Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-paper-industry): Filler and coating-grade GCC for paper mills.
- [Plastic Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-plastic-industry): Coated CaCO₃ for HDPE, PP, masterbatch.
- [PVC Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-pvc-industry): CaCO₃ for pipes, profiles, wire & cable.
- [Pharma Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-pharma-industry): High-purity excipient grades.
- [Rubber Industry](/calcium-carbonate-for-rubber-industry): Filler-grade CaCO₃ for rubber compounds.

## Resources

- [Calcium Carbonate Manufacturer India](/calcium-carbonate-manufacturer-india): Manufacturing overview and specifications.
- [GCC Supplier India](/gcc-supplier-india): Ground Calcium Carbonate supply across India.
- [Marble Powder for Paint Industry](/marble-powder-for-paint-industry): Paint-grade marble powder guide.
- [CaCO₃ for Paper Industry](/caco3-for-paper-industry): Paper-grade CaCO₃ reference.
- [PCC vs GCC Difference](/pcc-vs-gcc-difference): Comparison of Precipitated vs Ground Calcium Carbonate.
